results.text:
The Bottom Line between Vibe Coding & a Developer:

Hiring a developer who knows how to use AI is like hiring a chef who knows how to use a sous-chef. 

Hiring someone who’s never coded but wants AI to do it all? That’s like hiring someone who’s never cooked and handing them a microwave.

If you’re building anything serious, apps, games, marketplaces, trading bots, or NFT platforms, you want someone who can drive the AI, not be driven by it.

AI will never replace developers; it will make us Bet
